## Full Report: Relevant C# Scripts

### 1. Player Respawn / Falling Off Map / Boundary Detection

#### `E:\unity\projs\final_proj\Assets\Scripts\PlayerController.cs`

This is the main player script. It handles:

- **Fall-off-map detection** (line 49): `if (transform.position.y < deathY) Respawn();` — checks if the player falls below `deathY` (default `-4f`) every frame in `Update()`.
- **Respawn** (lines 108-119): `Respawn()` zeroes velocity, resets position to `startPosition`, clears potion count to 0, and calls `ResetStatus()` on `StatusUI` to restore hunger/sugar to full.
- **Potion system** (lines 18-22, 68-75, 99-105): Tracks potion count (max 3), allows using potion via `Q` key which drains 15 sugar, and exposes `AddPotion()` for pickup scripts.
- **Movement/jump** (full update/fixed update blocks).

```csharp
using UnityEngine;

[RequireComponent(typeof(Rigidbody2D))]
public class PlayerController : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Movement")]
    public float moveSpeed = 8f;
    public float jumpForce = 18f;

    [Header("Ground Check")]
    public float groundCheckDistance = 0.15f;
    public LayerMask groundLayer = ~0;

    [Header("Respawn")]
    public Vector3 startPosition = new Vector3(1f, 1f, 0f);
    public float deathY = -4f;

    [Header("Potion")]
    public int maxPotions = 3;
    public float sugarDrainPerUse = 15f;

    private int potionCount;
    private Rigidbody2D rb;
    private Animator animator;
    private SpriteRenderer spriteRenderer;
    private Collider2D selfCollider;
    private bool isGrounded;
    private float moveInput;
    private bool jumpRequested;
    private StatusUI statusUI;

    static readonly int HashSpeed = Animator.StringToHash("Speed");
    static readonly int HashJump = Animator.StringToHash("Jump");

    void Awake()
    {
        rb = GetComponent<Rigidbody2D>();
        animator = GetComponent<Animator>();
        spriteRenderer = GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
        selfCollider = GetComponent<Collider2D>();
        statusUI = FindObjectOfType<StatusUI>();
    }

    void Start()
    {
        startPosition = transform.position;
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (transform.position.y < deathY)
        {
            Respawn();
            return;
        }

        moveInput = 0f;
        if (Input.GetKey(KeyCode.LeftArrow) || Input.GetKey(KeyCode.A))
            moveInput = -1f;
        if (Input.GetKey(KeyCode.RightArrow) || Input.GetKey(KeyCode.D))
            moveInput = 1f;

        if (moveInput != 0f)
            spriteRenderer.flipX = moveInput > 0f;

        if ((Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.W) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Space)) && isGrounded)
            jumpRequested = true;

        if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Q) && potionCount > 0 && statusUI != null)
        {
            statusUI.AddSugar(-sugarDrainPerUse);
            potionCount--;
            statusUI.UpdatePotionUI(potionCount);
        }

        animator.SetFloat(HashSpeed, Mathf.Abs(moveInput));
    }

    void FixedUpdate()
    {
        isGrounded = false;

        Bounds bounds = selfCollider.bounds;
        selfCollider.enabled = false;
        Vector2 boxCenter = new Vector2(bounds.center.x, bounds.min.y - groundCheckDistance * 0.5f);
        Vector2 boxSize = new Vector2(bounds.size.x * 0.9f, groundCheckDistance);
        isGrounded = Physics2D.OverlapBox(boxCenter, boxSize, 0f, groundLayer) != null;
        selfCollider.enabled = true;

        rb.velocity = new Vector2(moveInput * moveSpeed, rb.velocity.y);

        if (jumpRequested && isGrounded)
        {
            rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, jumpForce);
            animator.SetTrigger(HashJump);
            jumpRequested = false;
        }
    }

    public bool AddPotion()
    {
        if (potionCount >= maxPotions) return false;
        potionCount++;
        if (statusUI != null) statusUI.UpdatePotionUI(potionCount);
        return true;
    }

    public void Respawn()
    {
        rb.velocity = Vector2.zero;
        transform.position = startPosition;

        potionCount = 0;
        var status = FindObjectOfType<StatusUI>();
        if (status != null)
        {
            status.ResetStatus();
            status.UpdatePotionUI(0);
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

public class StatusUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Bars")]
    public Image hungerFill;
    public Image sugarFill;

    [Header("Value Texts")]
    public TMP_Text hungerValueText;
    public TMP_Text sugarValueText;

    [Header("Values")]
    [Range(0, 100)] public float hunger = 100f;
    [Range(0, 100)] public float sugar = 100f;

    [Header("Potion UI")]
    public TMP_Text potionText;

    [Header("Depletion Rate (per second)")]
    public float hungerRate = 2f;
    public float sugarRate = 1.5f;

    [Header("Max Values")]
    public float maxHunger = 100f;
    public float maxSugar = 100f;

    private bool isDead;

    void Start()
    {
        sugar = 70f;
        UpdateStatusUI();
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (isDead) return;

        hunger = Mathf.Clamp(hunger - hungerRate * Time.deltaTime, 0f, maxHunger);
        sugar = Mathf.Clamp(sugar - sugarRate * Time.deltaTime, 0f, maxSugar);
        UpdateStatusUI();

        if (hunger <= 0f || sugar <= 0f)
        {
            isDead = true;
            var pc = FindObjectOfType<PlayerController>();
            if (pc != null) pc.Respawn();
        }
    }

    private void UpdateStatusUI()
    {
        if (hungerFill != null)
        {
            hungerFill.type = Image.Type.Filled;
            hungerFill.fillMethod = Image.FillMethod.Horizontal;
            hungerFill.fillOrigin = (int)Image.OriginHorizontal.Left;
            hungerFill.fillAmount = hunger / maxHunger;
        }

        if (sugarFill != null)
        {
            sugarFill.type = Image.Type.Filled;
            sugarFill.fillMethod = Image.FillMethod.Horizontal;
            sugarFill.fillOrigin = (int)Image.OriginHorizontal.Left;
            sugarFill.fillAmount = sugar / maxSugar;
        }

        if (hungerValueText != null)
            hungerValueText.text = Mathf.RoundToInt(hunger).ToString();

        if (sugarValueText != null)
            sugarValueText.text = Mathf.RoundToInt(sugar).ToString();
    }

    public void UpdatePotionUI(int count)
    {
        if (potionText != null)
            potionText.text = $" X {count}";
    }

    public void ResetStatus()
    {
        hunger = maxHunger;
        sugar = 70f;
        isDead = false;
        UpdateStatusUI();
    }

    public void AddSugar(float amount)
    {
        sugar = Mathf.Clamp(sugar + amount, 0f, maxSugar);
    }

    public void AddHunger(float amount)
    {
        hunger = Mathf.Clamp(hunger + amount, 0f, maxHunger);
    }
}
```

```csharp
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using System.IO;

public class FoodBaker
{
    [MenuItem("Tools/Bake Food Prefabs", false, 1)]
    static void Bake()
    {
        string folder = "Assets/Prefabs/Mg3D_Food";
        string[] fbxs = Directory.GetFiles(folder, "*.fbx");
        int count = 0;

        foreach (string fbx in fbxs)
        {
            string name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(fbx);
            string modelPath = Path.Combine(folder, name + ".fbx").Replace("\\", "/");
            string prefabPath = Path.Combine(folder, name + ".prefab").Replace("\\", "/");

            if (File.Exists(prefabPath))
            {
                // Assign stats to existing prefab
                GameObject existing = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(prefabPath);
                if (existing != null)
                {
                    FoodItem food = existing.GetComponent<FoodItem>();
                    if (food != null) AssignStats(name, food);
                }
                continue;
            }

            GameObject model = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(modelPath);
            if (model == null) continue;

            GameObject instance = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(model);
            instance.name = name;
            instance.transform.localScale = Vector3.one * 0.5f;

            BoxCollider2D col = instance.AddComponent<BoxCollider2D>();
            col.isTrigger = true;
            col.size = new Vector2(1f, 1f);

            FoodItem foodComp = instance.AddComponent<FoodItem>();
            AssignStats(name, foodComp);

            PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(instance, prefabPath);
            Object.DestroyImmediate(instance);
            count++;
        }

        AssetDatabase.Refresh();
        Debug.Log($"Done! Created {count} food prefabs.");
    }

    static void AssignStats(string name, FoodItem food)
    {
        switch (name)
        {
            case "Hamburger":  food.sugarBonus = 15f; food.hungerBonus = 20f; break;
            case "Hotdog":     food.sugarBonus = 10f; food.hungerBonus = 15f; break;
            case "Cheese":     food.sugarBonus = 5f;  food.hungerBonus = 10f; break;
            case "Banana":     food.sugarBonus = 8f;  food.hungerBonus = 5f;  break;
            case "Cherry":     food.sugarBonus = 3f;  food.hungerBonus = 2f;  break;
            case "Olive":      food.sugarBonus = 2f;  food.hungerBonus = 1f;  break;
            case "Watermelon": food.sugarBonus = 5f;  food.hungerBonus = 8f;  break;
        }
    }
}
```

# Sugar-Run 100米地图说明

## 地图总览
- **总长**：100 米（5 段，每段 20 米）
- **类型**：2D 横版平台跳跃
- **风格**：类《天天酷跑》的连续跑酷

## 分段设计

### 第一段「厨房起点」(0-20m) - 草地
- 油烟灶台+汉堡陷阱
- 可乐陷阱
- 1 支胰岛素（8m 高空）
- 尖刺群（11-15m）
- 糖块（10m 处浮空）

### 第二段「餐桌跳跃」(20-40m) - 泥土
- 7 个高低平台连续跳跃
- 沙发陷阱（红方块）
- 2 处苹果回血
- 1 支胰岛素（28m）
- 可乐 + 汉堡陷阱各 1
- 全麦面包（34m）
- 尖刺群（31-33m）

### 第三段「食物工厂」(40-60m) - 石头
- 高空工厂平台（42m, 48m, 54m）
- **2 只糖怪巡逻**（43m, 50m）
- 锯子障碍（46m）
- 紧急糖块（48m 问号砖块，隐藏）
- 第 3 支胰岛素（45m）
- 5 颗糖果堆（41-43m）
- 工厂墙（蓝方块，50-51m）
- 尖刺群（56-58m）

### 第四段「血管管道」(60-80m) - 沙地
- 8 段管道连续跳跃
- **2 只糖怪**（65m, 73m）
- 红细胞漂浮物
- 第 4 支胰岛素（64m）
- 1 处苹果、1 处全麦面包
- 汉堡 + 可乐陷阱
- 尖刺跨越（78-79m）

### 第五段「诊室走廊」(80-100m) - 雪地
- 沙发陷阱（82m）
- 苹果回血
- 第 5 支胰岛素（87m）
- **糖怪**（89m）
- 可乐 + 全麦陷阱
- 终末糖怪（95m）
- **诊室门**（99m）= 终点

## 通关条件
- 抵达诊室门 (99m)
- 当前血糖 3.0-7.0 mmol/L
- 收集至少 **3 支胰岛素**（共 5 支可收集）
- 剩余生命 ≥ 1

## 操作
- A / ←：向左
- D / →：向右
- W / ↑ / 空格：跳跃

## 文件位置
- 场景：`Assets/Scenes/gamesense1.scene`
- 玩家脚本：`Assets/Scripts/PlayerController.cs`
- 相机脚本：`Assets/Scripts/CameraFollow.cs`
- 资源：Kenney New Platformer Pack（`Assets/kenney_new-platformer-pack-1.1/`）

```csharp
using UnityEngine;

[RequireComponent(typeof(Rigidbody2D))]
public class PlayerController : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Movement")]

    [Header("Potion")]

    private int potionCount;

    private Collider2D selfCollider;
    private bool isGrounded;
    private float moveInput;
    private bool jumpRequested;
    private StatusUI statusUI;

    static readonly int HashSpeed = Animator.StringToHash("Speed");
    static readonly int HashJump = Animator.StringToHash("Jump");

    void Awake()
    {
        rb = GetComponent<Rigidbody2D>();
        animator = GetComponent<Animator>();
        spriteRenderer = GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>();
        selfCollider = GetComponent<Collider2D>();
        statusUI = FindObjectOfType<StatusUI>();
    }

    void Start()
    {
        startPosition = transform.position;
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (transform.position.y < deathY)
        {
            Respawn();
            return;
        }

        moveInput = 0f;
        if (Input.GetKey(KeyCode.LeftArrow) || Input.GetKey(KeyCode.A))
            moveInput = -1f;
        if (Input.GetKey(KeyCode.RightArrow) || Input.GetKey(KeyCode.D))
            moveInput = 1f;

        if (moveInput != 0f)
            spriteRenderer.flipX = moveInput > 0f;

        if ((Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.UpArrow) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.W) || Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Space)) && isGrounded)
            jumpRequested = true;

        if (Input.GetKeyDown(KeyCode.Q) && potionCount > 0 && statusUI != null)
        {
            statusUI.AddSugar(-sugarDrainPerUse);
            potionCount--;
            statusUI.UpdatePotionUI(potionCount);
        }

        animator.SetFloat(HashSpeed, Mathf.Abs(moveInput));
    }

    void FixedUpdate()
    {
        isGrounded = false;

        Bounds bounds = selfCollider.bounds;
        selfCollider.enabled = false;
        Vector2 boxCenter = new Vector2(bounds.center.x, bounds.min.y - groundCheckDistance * 0.5f);
        Vector2 boxSize = new Vector2(bounds.size.x * 0.9f, groundCheckDistance);
        isGrounded = Physics2D.OverlapBox(boxCenter, boxSize, 0f, groundLayer) != null;
        selfCollider.enabled = true;

        rb.velocity = new Vector2(moveInput * moveSpeed, rb.velocity.y);

        if (jumpRequested && isGrounded)
        {
            rb.velocity = new Vector2(rb.velocity.x, jumpForce);
            animator.SetTrigger(HashJump);
            jumpRequested = false;
        }
    }

    public bool AddPotion()
    {
        if (potionCount >= maxPotions) return false;
        potionCount++;
        if (statusUI != null) statusUI.UpdatePotionUI(potionCount);
        return true;
    }

    public void Respawn()
    {
        rb.velocity = Vector2.zero;
        transform.position = startPosition;

        potionCount = 0;
        var status = FindObjectOfType<StatusUI>();
        if (status != null)
        {
            status.ResetStatus();
            status.UpdatePotionUI(0);
        }
    }
}
```

```csharp
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEngine.UI;
using TMPro;

public class StatusUI : MonoBehaviour
{
    [Header("Bars")]
    public Image hungerFill;
    public Image sugarFill;

    [Header("Value Texts")]
    public TMP_Text hungerValueText;
    public TMP_Text sugarValueText;

    [Header("Values")]
    [Range(0, 100)] public float hunger = 100f;
    [Range(0, 100)] public float sugar = 100f;

    [Header("Potion UI")]
    public TMP_Text potionText;

    [Header("Depletion Rate (per second)")]
    public float hungerRate = 2f;
    public float sugarRate = 1.5f;

    [Header("Max Values")]
    public float maxHunger = 100f;
    public float maxSugar = 100f;

    private bool isDead;

    void Start()
    {
        sugar = 70f;
        UpdateStatusUI();
    }

    void Update()
    {
        if (isDead) return;

        hunger = Mathf.Clamp(hunger - hungerRate * Time.deltaTime, 0f, maxHunger);
        sugar = Mathf.Clamp(sugar - sugarRate * Time.deltaTime, 0f, maxSugar);
        UpdateStatusUI();

        if (hunger <= 0f || sugar <= 0f)
        {
            isDead = true;
            var pc = FindObjectOfType<PlayerController>();
            if (pc != null) pc.Respawn();
        }
    }

    private void UpdateStatusUI()
    {
        if (hungerFill != null)
        {
            hungerFill.type = Image.Type.Filled;
            hungerFill.fillMethod = Image.FillMethod.Horizontal;
            hungerFill.fillOrigin = (int)Image.OriginHorizontal.Left;
            hungerFill.fillAmount = hunger / maxHunger;
        }

        if (sugarFill != null)
        {
            sugarFill.type = Image.Type.Filled;
            sugarFill.fillMethod = Image.FillMethod.Horizontal;
            sugarFill.fillOrigin = (int)Image.OriginHorizontal.Left;
            sugarFill.fillAmount = sugar / maxSugar;
        }

        if (hungerValueText != null)
            hungerValueText.text = Mathf.RoundToInt(hunger).ToString();

        if (sugarValueText != null)
            sugarValueText.text = Mathf.RoundToInt(sugar).ToString();
    }

    public void UpdatePotionUI(int count)
    {
        if (potionText != null)
            potionText.text = $" X {count}";
    }

    public void ResetStatus()
    {
        hunger = maxHunger;
        sugar = 70f;
        isDead = false;
        UpdateStatusUI();
    }

    public void AddSugar(float amount)
    {
        sugar = Mathf.Clamp(sugar + amount, 0f, maxSugar);
    }

    public void AddHunger(float amount)
    {
        hunger = Mathf.Clamp(hunger + amount, 0f, maxHunger);
    }
}
```

Editor tool for baking food prefabs from FBX models. Automatically adds `FoodItem` script with appropriate stat values per food type.

```csharp
using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using System.IO;

public class FoodBaker
{
    [MenuItem("Tools/Bake Food Prefabs", false, 1)]
    static void Bake()
    {
        string folder = "Assets/Prefabs/Mg3D_Food";
        string[] fbxs = Directory.GetFiles(folder, "*.fbx");
        int count = 0;

        foreach (string fbx in fbxs)
        {
            string name = Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension(fbx);
            string modelPath = Path.Combine(folder, name + ".fbx").Replace("\\", "/");
            string prefabPath = Path.Combine(folder, name + ".prefab").Replace("\\", "/");

            if (File.Exists(prefabPath))
            {
                // Assign stats to existing prefab
                GameObject existing = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(prefabPath);
                if (existing != null)
                {
                    FoodItem food = existing.GetComponent<FoodItem>();
                    if (food != null) AssignStats(name, food);
                }
                continue;
            }

            GameObject model = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<GameObject>(modelPath);
            if (model == null) continue;

            GameObject instance = (GameObject)PrefabUtility.InstantiatePrefab(model);
            instance.name = name;
            instance.transform.localScale = Vector3.one * 0.5f;

            BoxCollider2D col = instance.AddComponent<BoxCollider2D>();
            col.isTrigger = true;
            col.size = new Vector2(1f, 1f);

            FoodItem foodComp = instance.AddComponent<FoodItem>();
            AssignStats(name, foodComp);

            PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(instance, prefabPath);
            Object.DestroyImmediate(instance);
            count++;
        }

        AssetDatabase.Refresh();
        Debug.Log($"Done! Created {count} food prefabs.");
    }

    static void AssignStats(string name, FoodItem food)
    {
        switch (name)
        {
            case "Hamburger":  food.sugarBonus = 15f; food.hungerBonus = 20f; break;
            case "Hotdog":     food.sugarBonus = 10f; food.hungerBonus = 15f; break;
            case "Cheese":     food.sugarBonus = 5f;  food.hungerBonus = 10f; break;
            case "Banana":     food.sugarBonus = 8f;  food.hungerBonus = 5f;  break;
            case "Cherry":     food.sugarBonus = 3f;  food.hungerBonus = 2f;  break;
            case "Olive":      food.sugarBonus = 2f;  food.hungerBonus = 1f;  break;
            case "Watermelon": food.sugarBonus = 5f;  food.hungerBonus = 8f;  break;
        }
    }
}
```

functionDeclarations.description: Efficiently finds files matching specific glob patterns (e.g., `src/**/*.ts`, `**/*.md`), returning absolute paths sorted by modification time (newest first). Ideal for quickly locating files based on their name or path structure, especially in large codebases.

pattern.description: The glob pattern to match against (e.g., '**/*.py', 'docs/*.md').

path.description: Optional: The absolute path to the directory to search within. If omitted, searches the root directory.

case_sensitive.description: Optional: Whether the search should be case-sensitive. Defaults to false.

respect_git_ignore.description: Optional: Whether to respect .gitignore patterns when finding files. Only available in git repositories. Defaults to true.

maxResults.description: Optional: Maximum number of file paths to return (default: 1000). Use to limit output for broad patterns.

Files whose selected range exceeds 256 KB are truncated with an advisory; use 'offset' and 'limit' only if the file is too large to read at once — it's recommended to read the whole file by not providing these parameters. Handles text, images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP), and PDF files. For images, videos or other multimedia files, use the 'analyze_multimedia' tool if available.

absolute_path.description: The absolute path to the file to read (e.g., '/home/user/project/file.txt'). Relative paths are not supported. You must provide an absolute path.

functionDeclarations.name: run_shell_command
functionDeclarations.description:
This tool executes a given shell command using the best available Windows shell (PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt).

IMPORTANT:
- This tool is for terminal operations (e.g., git / npm / docker / build & test commands).
- DO NOT use this tool for file operations like reading, writing, editing, or searching files. Prefer the dedicated file tools for those actions.
- Quote any file path that contains spaces with double quotes, e.g. `cd "/path with spaces"` or `python "/path with spaces/script.py"`.
- If a command would produce very large output, prefer adding flags/filters (narrow paths, limit counts, request specific fields, machine-readable formats like JSON) to keep output small and unambiguous.
- Very large outputs may be returned as the most recent tail of the output. Earlier content may be truncated from the beginning. If the tool reports a "Full output saved to: <path>", that file contains the full command output. Use the exact path returned by the tool, then prefer searching that file first (grep/rg or platform equivalents) for specific ERROR/WARN/FAIL/SUCCESS markers, then reading small slices (with `read_file` using `offset`/`limit`) or tailing the log file instead of re-running expensive commands.
- Do not append truncating pipelines such as `| tail`, `| Select-Object -Last`, or similar to an expensive first run just to suppress output. Those discard earlier context and force a re-run if you later need omitted lines. Let the tool/log capture the full output, then inspect the saved log file.
- When issuing multiple shell commands in one response, parallelize only when they are truly independent and do not compete for the same files, directories, logs, locks, caches, git state, or ports. If one command depends on another or shared state may race, run them sequentially.

The following information is returned:
- Command: Executed command.
- Directory: Directory where command was executed, or `(root)`.
- Output: Combined command output (stdout/stderr). Can be `(empty)` or an excerpt if very large.
- Error: Error or `(none)` if no error was reported for the subprocess.
- Exit Code: Exit code or `(none)` if terminated by signal.
- Signal: Signal number or `(none)` if no signal was received.

command.description: Exact command to execute using the best available Windows shell (automatically selected from PowerShell Core, Windows PowerShell, or Command Prompt). Quote any file paths containing spaces with double quotes.

description.description: Brief description of the command for the user. Be specific and concise. Ideally a single sentence. Can be up to 3 sentences for clarity. No line breaks.

directory.description: (OPTIONAL) The absolute path of the directory to run the command in. If not provided, the project root directory is used. Must be a directory within the workspace and must already exist.

run_in_background.description: Set to true to run this command in the background. Returns immediately with task metadata and an output file path.

## Complete Findings

I thoroughly searched `E:\unity\projs\final_proj\Assets\Scripts\` and found 11 C# scripts, reading all of them. Here are the relevant findings organized by category:

### 1. Player Respawn / Falling Off Map / Boundary Detection
- **`Assets/Scripts/PlayerController.cs`** — Main player script with Y-boundary check (`deathY = -4f`) that triggers `Respawn()` in `Update()`. Respawn zeroes velocity, resets position to `startPosition`, clears potions, and calls `StatusUI.ResetStatus()`. Also houses the potion inventory (max 3, use with Q key).
- **`Assets/Scripts/DeathZone.cs`** — Simple trigger zone that calls `PlayerController.Respawn()` on any colliding Player.
- **`Assets/Scripts/StatusUI.cs`** — Manages hunger/sugar depletion over time; triggers `Respawn()` when either reaches 0.

### 2. Item Pickup / Consumable / Collectible Items
- **`Assets/Scripts/FoodItem.cs`** — Trigger-based pickup. Adds configurable `sugarBonus`/`hungerBonus` to `StatusUI`, then `Destroy(gameObject)`.
- **`Assets/Scripts/PotionItem.cs`** — Trigger-based pickup. Calls `PlayerController.AddPotion()` (up to 3 max), then `Destroy(gameObject)`.
- **`Assets/Editor/FoodBaker.cs`** — Editor tool (Tools > Bake Food Prefabs) that creates food prefabs from FBX models with pre-assigned `FoodItem` stats (Hamburger, Hotdog, Cheese, Banana, Cherry, Olive, Watermelon).

### 3. Item Spawning / Regeneration
- **No runtime spawner/regeneration script exists.** The `Assets/Editor/BuildMap.cs` editor tool statically places coins, gems, and hearts at build time. A `FoodSpawner.prefab` exists in `Assets/Prefabs/Mg3D_Food/` but has no corresponding `FoodSpawner.cs` script — there is no runtime respawning logic anywhere in the codebase.

### Non-relevant scripts (also read for completeness)
- `CameraFollow.cs` — Dynamic camera follow with zoom
- `FloatObject.cs`, `MoveHorizontal.cs`, `MoveVertical.cs` — Object animation/movement
- `AcidFlow.cs` — Visual wave mesh effect on acid
